title: Connector/J 8 query with explain can not return ResultRow
poc:
CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS test DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4
DEFAULT COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test.`t_b` ( `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `value` float DEFAULT NULL, `created_at` datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test.`t_c` ( `ref_id` int NOT NULL, `description` text DEFAULT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (`ref_id`) REFERENCES test.`t_b`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE );
INSERT INTO test.`t_c` (ref_id, description) VALUES (1, 'First entry'), (2, 'Second entry'), (3, NULL);
SELECT * FROM test.`t_c` WHERE ref_id IN (SELECT id FROM test.`t_b` WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
